Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. User opens the registration form.
2. User enters the username "testuser" and password "testpassword".
3. User clicks on the "Register" button.
4. User Registration calls saveUserData().
5. Users Database saves user data.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. User opens the login form.
2. User enters the username "testuser" and password "testpassword".
3. User clicks on the "Login" button.
4. User sends a login message to the system with their username and password.
5. System verifies the credentials.
6. System returns true if credentials are correct.

Title: User Logout
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Logout" button.
2. User sends a logout message to the system.
3. System processes the logout request.

Title: Create Trip
Test Data:
- Trip Name: Vacation
- Date: 2023-10-01
- Category: Personal
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the trip creation page.
2. User enters the trip name "Vacation", date "2023-10-01", and category "Personal".
3. User clicks on the "Create Trip" button.
4. System creates the trip.

Title: Delete Trip
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a trip.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the trip deletion page.
2. User selects the trip with ID 1.
3. User clicks on the "Delete Trip" button.
4. System deletes the trip.

Title: Create Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a trip.
Test Data:
- Plan Name: Day 1
- Date: 2023-10-01
- Category: Travel
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plan creation page.
2. User enters the plan name "Day 1", date "2023-10-01", and category "Travel".
3. User clicks on the "Create Plan" button.
4. System creates the plan.

Title: Delete Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a plan.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the plan deletion page.
2. User selects the plan with ID 1.
3. User clicks on the "Delete Plan" button.
4. System deletes the plan.

Title: Create Daily Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a plan.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the daily plan creation page.
2. User selects the user with ID 1 and the plan with ID 1.
3. User enters the date "2023-10-01".
4. User clicks on the "Create Daily Plan" button.
5. System creates the daily plan.

Title: Delete Daily Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a daily plan.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the daily plan deletion page.
2. User selects the daily plan with ID 1.
3. User clicks on the "Delete Daily Plan" button.
4. System deletes the daily plan.

Title: Get Profile
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile page.
2. User clicks on the "Get Profile" button.
3. UserProfile sends a getProfile message to the User.
4. User retrieves the profile information.

Title: Update Profile
Test Data:
- New Name: John Doe
- New Email: john.doe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile update page.
2. User enters the new name "John Doe" and new email "john.doe@example.com".
3. User clicks on the "Update Profile" button.
4. UserProfile sends an updateProfile message to the User.
5. User updates the profile information.

Title: Invalid Profile Update
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile update page.
2. User enters the new name "12345" and new email "invalidemail".
3. User clicks on the "Update Profile" button.
4. UserProfile sends an updateProfile message to the User.
5. User receives an error message due to invalid input.
Expected Result: User profile update fails due to invalid input.

Title: Delete User
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the user deletion page.
2. User selects the user with ID 1.
3. User clicks on the "Delete User" button.
4. UsersDatabase deletes the user.

Title: Invalid User Deletion
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the user deletion page.
2. User selects the user with ID 99999.
3. User clicks on the "Delete User" button.
4. UsersDatabase returns an error message due to non-existent user.
Expected Result: User deletion fails due to non-existent user.

Test Steps:
